uplink.description: fPort 10 sensor data: 25.0 C, 50% RH, CO2 600 ppm, battery 85%, AQI 40, gas1 1.5 ppm, gas2 0.75 ppm, heartbeat/button
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data produced by mapping the output of reference/upstream-codec.js into the normalized vocabulary (temperature->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity, co2->air.co2, battery percent->batteryPercent; aqi/event/gas1/gas2 are camelCase extras).

uplink.description: fPort 10 sensor data: negative temperature -5.0 C, 33% RH, CO2 420 ppm, battery 100%, AQI 10 (exercises signed 10-bit temperature decode)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data produced by mapping the output of reference/upstream-codec.js. Below-zero temperature (raw < 300) verifies the (raw-300)/10 offset decode.

uplink.description: fPort 11 air-quality data: TVOC 150 ppb, PM1.0 5.0, PM2.5 12.5, PM10 20.0 ug/m3 (vocabulary models none of these, so all are camelCase extras)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data produced from reference/upstream-codec.js. Upstream emits dotted keys (pm1.0/pm2.5/pm10) which are not valid extras; normalized to camelCase/underscore (pm1_0/pm2_5/pm10) per AUTHORING extras rule.
Upstream example input; expected.data produced by reference/upstream-codec.js. firmwareVersion has no vocabulary key -> camelCase extra.

uplink.description: fPort 12 device settings: interval 15 min, status LED on, active sensors T/H,CO2,PMx,Gas1, gas1 NH3, gas2 None
uplink._note: Upstream example input; expected.data produced by reference/upstream-codec.js. Device-configuration fields have no vocabulary key -> camelCase extras.

uplink.description: fPort 13 threshold subtype 0: high temp 40 C, low temp 10 C, high RH 95%, low RH 35%
uplink._note: Upstream example input; expected.data produced by reference/upstream-codec.js. Threshold configuration -> camelCase extras.

uplink.description: fPort 13 threshold subtype 1: CO2 1500 ppm, TVOC 435 ppb, gas1 2 ppm, gas2 2 ppm
uplink._note: Upstream example input; expected.data produced by reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: fPort 13 threshold subtype 2: PM1.0 0, PM2.5 56, PM10 254 ug/m3
uplink._note: Upstream example input; expected.data produced by reference/upstream-codec.js. Dotted upstream keys normalized to camelCase/underscore.

uplink.description: fPort 13 unknown threshold subtype returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic: subtype byte outside {0,1,2}; mirrors upstream's default-branch error.
Synthetic: fPort not handled by the decoder; mirrors upstream's default-branch error.
